queries.question: What magicians are located in Central Park, New York and what mimes are in the same location?
queries.sql:
SELECT Magicians.name
FROM Locations JOIN Magicians ON Locations.id = Magicians.Street_Location
WHERE Locations.LocationName = "Central Park, New York"
UNION
SELECT Mimes.name
FROM Locations JOIN Mimes ON Locations.id = Mimes.Street_Location
WHERE Locations.LocationName = "Central Park, New York"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?locations a :Location .
    ?magicians a :Magicians .
    ?magicians p:hasLocations ?locations .
    ?magicians p:name ?name .
    ?locations p:LocationName ?locationname_f .
    FILTER(STR(?locationname_f) = "Central Park, New York")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?locations a :Location .
    ?mimes a :Mimes .
    ?mimes p:hasLocations ?locations .
    ?mimes p:name ?name .
    ?locations p:LocationName ?locationname_f .
    FILTER(STR(?locationname_f) = "Central Park, New York")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Provide a list of all magicians and also provide a list of mimes located in Central Park, New York.
queries.sql:
SELECT Magicians.name
FROM Locations JOIN Magicians ON Locations.id = Magicians.Street_Location
UNION
SELECT Mimes.name
FROM Locations JOIN Mimes ON Locations.id = Mimes.Street_Location
WHERE Locations.LocationName = "Central Park, New York"

SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?locations a :Location .
    ?magicians a :Magicians .
    ?magicians p:hasLocations ?locations .
    ?magicians p:name ?name .
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?locations a :Location .
    ?mimes a :Mimes .
    ?mimes p:hasLocations ?locations .
    ?mimes p:name ?name .
    ?locations p:LocationName ?locationname_f .
    FILTER(STR(?locationname_f) = "Central Park, New York")

ambiguous_dsl.question: List magicians and mimes in Central Park, New York.
